inputs.label: Grade 1
inputs.businessContext: The score achieved in the first assignment.

businessContext_i18n.en: The score achieved in the first assignment.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die in der ersten Aufgabe erreichte Punktzahl
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le score obtenu dans le premier devoir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación obtenida en la primera tarea.

inputs.label: Weight 1
inputs.businessContext: The weight of the first assignment as percentage of total.

businessContext_i18n.en: The weight of the first assignment as percentage of total.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci ödevin toplam içindeki ağırlığı (yüzde olarak).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht der ersten Aufgabe als Prozentsatz der Gesamtnote.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le poids de la première affectation en pourcentage du total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso de la primera tarea como porcentaje del total.
businessContext_i18n.ar: وزن المهمة الأولى كنسبة مئوية من الإجمالي.

formulas.weightedGrade: (grade1 * weight1 + grade2 * weight2 + grade3 * weight3 + grade4 * weight4) / (weight1 + weight2 + weight3 + weight4)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
